name: Mrs Fields Banana Nut Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300°F.
2. In a medium bowl, combine flour, baking soda, and salt. Mix well and set aside.
3. In a large bowl with an electric mixer, blend sugars at medium speed.
4. Add butter and mix to form a grainy paste, scraping down the sides of the bowl.
5. Add egg, banana liqueur or extract, and bananas, and beat at medium speed until smooth.
6. Gradually add the flour mixture, 1 cup of chocolate chips, and walnuts, blending at low speed until just combined.
7. Drop rounded tablespoons of dough onto ungreased cookie sheets, 2 inches apart.
8. Sprinkle cookies with chocolate chips, about 6 to 8 per cookie.
9. Bake for 25-27 minutes or until the cookie edges begin to brown. Transfer immediately to a cool surface.
